summary_one_line: An ICC profile embedding a Type-4 parametric tone curve whose coefficients drive e = Params[1]*R + Params[2] non-positive at R >= Params[4].

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input bytes parsed into an ICC profile that selects parametric curve Type 4 (case 4, sRGB) and supplies Params[4]/Params[1]/Params[2] coefficients such that for some sample R>=Params[4] the linear form e = Params[1]*R + Params[2] evaluates to <= 0, taking the False side of the e>0 gate at cmsgamma.c:497. The structural precondition is a magic-byte-laden profile header (acsp 'acspAPPL', profile-class/colorspace tags) whose downstream tag table points at a Type-4 parametricCurveType.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winning seeds carry the lcms/acsp profile skeleton with valid header magic and varying colorspace tags (RGB/Lab) at offsets 0x14-0x16, and they drive the blocker's enclosing function 941000 times vs 204000 for losers, with the False side actually taken (W F=59900 at line 497 vs L F=0); cmplog/vpc reached this via I2S substitution (dash-row ancestors).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds reach case 4 far less (DefaultEvalParametricFn 204000 invocations) and never take the False side (L 497 F=0): they hit the e>0 True side only, so the non-positive-e configuration of a Type-4 curve is never assembled by plain havoc/CMP_MAP mutation.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/value_profile_cmplog I2SRandReplace substitutes logged CMP operands (the magic/tag-table integers gating the parametric-curve dispatch and the Type-4 selection) directly into the input bytes, assembling the multi-field profile structure that naive havoc and value_profile's Hamming-gradient feedback cannot synthesize, then letting downstream mutation drive e non-positive.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs at this branch are I2S-delta pairs.
The second decisive pair cmplog>naive is also an I2S delta.
The blocker is the e>0 gate inside case 4 (sRGB parametric curve) where e is the linear form Params[1]*R + Params[2].
The globally blocked side is the False branch (e <= 0).
Winners exercise the False side of line 497 while losers never do.
Winners invoke the enclosing parametric-curve function far more than losers, indicating they assemble the curve-dispatch structure.
Winning seeds carry the lcms/acsp ICC profile skeleton with colorspace tags varying across RGB/Lab.
Loser-blocking seeds also carry the acsp profile skeleton but concentrate on XYZ colorspace and the same header magic.
cmplog supplies the I2SRandReplace mutator that substitutes logged CMP operands into the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack **plus** `I2SRandReplace`.
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, only havoc/token.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile relies on CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback and has no I2S mutator.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2112 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 2 --seed ffbdfb33c7583b66` and observed I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 7 and 8 of the ancestor chain; also ran it for the vpc winner `--fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1d0b833734277e2d` and observed dash rows at depths 13 and 14, corroborating an I2S contribution for both decisive I2S pairs.
mechanism_consistency_check._note: dash-row floor is the I2S signal under the current build (cmplog/vpc-exclusive vs naive/value_profile).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness exposing the same e>0 gate inside a Type-4 parametric curve whose selection/coefficient fields are NOT pre-images of input bytes (e.g. fixed at compile time) shows cmplog and value_profile_cmplog resolving the False side no faster than naive and value_profile.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact CMP operand that I2S substitutes (the parametric-curve Type selector / tag-table offset vs the header magic) is inferred from structure and hit-count divergence rather than read directly from a logged CMP entry.
